ddls:
CREATE TABLE "strategies" (
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading strategy */,
  "strategy_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading strategy */,
  "price_outlook" INTEGER /* Expected price outlook for the strategy (foreign key to price_outlooks) */,
  "volatility_outlook" INTEGER /* Expected volatility outlook for the strategy (foreign key to volatility_outlooks) */,
  "profit_potential" INTEGER /* Profit potential of the strategy (foreign key to profit_potentials) */,
  "risk_level" INTEGER /* Risk level of the strategy (foreign key to risk_levels) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the strategy, including its mechanics and usage scenarios */,
  "strategy_type" TEXT /* Type of strategy (e.g., Bullish, Bearish, Neutral) */,
  "strategy_category" TEXT /* Category of strategy (e.g., Directional, Volatility, Income) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the strategy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the strategy was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the strategy */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the strategy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("strategy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategies_profit_potential FOREIGN KEY ("profit_potential") REFERENCES profit_potentials ("potential_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategies_price_outlook FOREIGN KEY ("price_outlook") REFERENCES price_outlooks ("outlook_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategies_volatility_outlook FOREIGN KEY ("volatility_outlook") REFERENCES volatility_outlooks ("outlook_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategies_risk_level FOREIGN KEY ("risk_level") REFERENCES risk_levels ("risk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_outlooks" (
  "outlook_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price outlook */,
  "outlook_name" TEXT /* Name of the price outlook (e.g., Bullish, Bearish) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the price outlook, including market conditions and implications */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the outlook was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the outlook was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the outlook */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the outlook */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlook_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "volatility_outlooks" (
  "outlook_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each volatility outlook */,
  "outlook_name" TEXT /* Name of the volatility outlook (e.g., Rising, Stable, Falling) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the volatility outlook, including market conditions and implications */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the outlook was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the outlook was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the outlook */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the outlook */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outlook_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "profit_potentials" (
  "potential_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each profit potential */,
  "potential_name" TEXT /* Name of the profit potential (e.g., Unlimited, Limited) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the profit potential, including maximum and minimum gains */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the potential was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the potential was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the potential */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the potential */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("potential_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "risk_levels" (
  "risk_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each risk level */,
  "risk_name" TEXT /* Name of the risk level (e.g., Limited, High) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the risk level, including potential losses and risk management strategies */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the risk level was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the risk level was last updated */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the risk level */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the risk level */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("risk_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "strategy_details" (
  "detail_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each strategy detail entry */,
  "strategy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading strategy (foreign key to strategies) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the strategy execution or analysis */,
  "underlying_asset" TEXT /* Underlying asset for the strategy (e.g., stock, index) */,
  "entry_price" REAL /* Entry price of the underlying asset */,
  "exit_price" REAL /* Exit price of the underlying asset */,
  "profit_or_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss realized from the strategy */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes about the strategy execution */,
  "market_conditions" TEXT /* Description of the market conditions when the strategy was executed */,
  "investment_goal" TEXT /* Investment goal associated with the strategy (e.g., Capital Appreciation, Income Generation) */,
  "strategy_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the strategy (e.g., Short-term, Long-term) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the detail was last updated */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the detail */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("detail_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_strategy_details_strategy_id FOREIGN KEY ("strategy_id") REFERENCES strategies ("strategy_id")
)
